nursing facility (SNF), or home health claim, or two Part B (institutional or non-institutional) claims 
that are at least one day apart, with a heart failure and non-ischemic heart disease code in any 
position during the two-year reference period. 

You can find more detailed information on the algorithm criteria on the CCW website: 
https://www.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories-chro
